---
title: "References — Molecular pathology"
---

Literature underpinning CTIR's [`molpathR`](https://github.com/CTTIR/molpathR): variant analysis, NGS file-format specifications, and clinical-genomics knowledge bases.

::: {.callout-warning}
## TODO_FILL_BEFORE_DEPLOY

Awaiting DOI-verified citations. Expected entries:

- VCF format specification (Danecek et al., 2011)
- BAM / SAMtools (Li et al., 2009)
- GATK Best Practices (Van der Auwera et al., 2013, plus updated current-version reference)
- ClinVar (Landrum et al., current edition)
- OncoKB (Chakravarty et al., 2017)
- AMP/ASCO/CAP variant interpretation guidelines (Li et al., 2017)
:::
